base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of no_sprite_clean_variants — a tile from 1992 super mario kart. All 20 tracks + 4 arenas also ripped as 'No Sprites' clean tile-map versions (asset IDs 84993-85016) — useful for level-design reference. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: All 20 tracks + 4 arenas also ripped as 'No Sprites' clean tile-map versions (asset IDs 84993-85016) — useful for level-design reference
